user.title: Mojelektro Mini
user.description: Enter the Moj Elektro API token and the metering place identifier (EIMM). The integration will discover the metering point and registers automatically.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Moj Elektro API with these credentials.
error.cannot_resolve_metering_point: The API did not return a usage point and OMTO metering point for this identifier.

abort.already_configured: This usage point is already configured.

init.title: Mojelektro Mini
init.description: Adjust runtime settings for the integration.
